ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier (airline) operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "dest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "scheduled_dep_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "actual_dep_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "scheduled_arr_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_arr_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "binned_crs_dep_time" INTEGER /* Binned CRS (Common Reporting Standards) departure time */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report corresponding to the flight */,
  "day_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1=Monday, 7=Sunday) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in kilograms */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight departs or arrives */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when boarding begins */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time based on the current flight status */,
  "gate_closure_time" TEXT /* Time when the gate closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_code" TEXT /* Code of the carrier (e.g., AA for American Airlines) */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the carrier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the carrier */,
  "frequent_destinations" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of frequent destinations served by the carrier */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the carrier's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer service phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., LGA for LaGuardia Airport) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "number_of_terminals" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  "parking_options" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of parking options available at the airport */,
  "terminal_layout" TEXT /* Description of the terminal layout */,
  "nearest_city_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest major city from the airport */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Name of the nearest major city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the weather report is associated with */,
  "weather_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather report */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., North, South) */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Speed of wind gusts in kilometers per hour */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Depth of snow in centimeters */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "fog" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there is fog (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the log entry is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight at the time of the log */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the status log (e.g., ground crew, air traffic control) */,
  "log_location" TEXT /* Location where the status change occurred */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the delay is associated with */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the delay */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the delay */,
  "delay_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on the overall flight schedule (e.g., minor, significant) */,
  "affected_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers affected by the delay */,
  "compensation_provided" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if compensation was provided to passengers (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the cancellation is associated with */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_time" TEXT /* Time of the cancellation */,
  "affected_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers affected by the cancellation */,
  "rebooking_options" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of rebooking options provided to passengers */,
  "compensation_provided" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if compensation was provided to passengers (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the flight data */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "affected_columns" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of columns that were changed */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the old values of the changed columns */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the new values of the changed columns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_version_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., delay, cancellation) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of recipients who received the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_alerts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration activity */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the collaboration is associated with */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., operations, maintenance) */,
  "collaboration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "collaboration_participants" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of participants involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_collaborations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
